paper_title: Validation and Representativeness of Passive Sampling in Fractured Aquifers

methods.method_name: Validation of Passive Sampling at Depth
methods.description: This method validates the efficiency of passive sampling at depth by comparing concentrations collected after equilibration with those obtained through low flow pumping at the same depths.

steps.description: Samplers' concentrations collected after 6 days of equilibration are compared with samples collected by low flow pumping at the same depths.
steps.searchable_summary: compare sampler concentrations with low flow pumping samples

steps.description: Electroneutrality errors for the samples were all below 3.9%.
Mean error of 2% calculated from 33 comparative measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mean error from comparative measurements

steps.description: Analyze discrepancies in Cl− and SO4 2− measurements at specific depths.
Stable isotopes of water show good agreement between both sampling methods.
steps.searchable_summary: validate stable isotope agreement between methods

methods.description: This method compares the chemical composition of the equivalent mixture calculated from the intensity and composition at each fracture with the composition of the sample collected at the main pumping discharge.

steps.description: Compare the chemical composition of the equivalent mixture with the composition of the sample collected at the discharge of the main pumping.
steps.searchable_summary: compare chemical compositions of equivalent mixture and main discharge sample

steps.description: Check agreement of physical parameters, major ions, and stable isotopes with differences of less than 5%, except for electrical conductivity and SO4 2−.
steps.searchable_summary: validate agreement of parameters and ions with specified differences

methods.description: This method assesses the representativeness of sequential sampling with depth in fractured aquifers, considering the distribution of fractures and flow conditions.

steps.description: Conduct borehole logging before sampling to assess fracture distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: perform borehole logging to assess fracture distribution

steps.description: Constrain flows into the well during passive sampling to determine water composition at each inflowing fracture.
steps.searchable_summary: constrain well flows during sampling to determine fracture water composition

steps.description: Analyze the impact of stagnant water and ambient flows on sampler composition.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze impact of stagnant water and ambient flows on sampler composition
